ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shoe_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe size */,
  "us_size" REAL /* US shoe size */,
  "euro_size" TEXT /* European shoe size */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* UK shoe size */,
  "inches" TEXT /* Inches measurement */,
  "cm" REAL /* Centimeter measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shoe_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the shoe type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shoe type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the shoe type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe type the product belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe size the product has */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency the price is in */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the shoe */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the shoe */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the shoe in grams */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average customer rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES shoe_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency the total is in */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order will be shipped */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "preferred_language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred language */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order history entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency the total is in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_history" (
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe size */,
  "us_size" REAL /* US shoe size */,
  "euro_size" TEXT /* European shoe size */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* UK shoe size */,
  "inches" TEXT /* Inches measurement */,
  "cm" REAL /* Centimeter measurement */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id")
)
